moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, is set to begin tomorrow at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from July 16th to 19th.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for golf's biggest test! The Open Championship begins tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is buzzing! The 154th Open Championship is almost here, bringing the world's best golfers to Southport from tomorrow.

moments.title: Tour de France Mid-Race Drama
moments.blurb: The 2026 Tour de France is well underway, with riders currently tackling Stage 11 of the iconic race, which runs until July 26th.

angles.name: Current Stage
angles.copy: It's Stage 11 of the Tour de France today! Who's holding the yellow jersey as the peloton battles it out?

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The Tour de France is delivering daily drama! Catch up on all the action as the race heads towards its grand finale on July 26th.

moments.title: Love Island UK Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK continues its 13th series, which premiered on June 1st and is expected to conclude around July 27th, with daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Daily Recap/Anticipation
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's getting dumped tonight?

angles.name: Hot Takes
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is delivering all the feels! What's your biggest 'ick' from this series so far?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Just over a week until Latitude Festival kicks off! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi, David Byrne, Teddy Swims – Latitude's 20th anniversary lineup is stacked! Get ready for a huge weekend in Suffolk. #LatitudeFestival

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Final Bow
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival takes place this weekend, July 18th-19th, at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, with organisers announcing it will be the event's last ever.

angles.name: Last Chance
angles.copy: It's the final Splendour Festival this weekend! Heading to Wollaton Hall for one last hurrah? What's been your favourite memory?

angles.name: Local Nottingham
angles.copy: Nottingham, are you ready to send Splendour Festival off in style? This weekend is the last ever – let's make it unforgettable!

moments.title: Together Again Festival Nears
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival will bring music, arts, and culture to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24th to 26th.

angles.name: Festival Lineup Tease
angles.copy: Get ready for three days of tech house, disco, and bass! Together Again Festival is at Bolesworth Castle next week. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Cheshire Event
angles.copy: Bolesworth Castle is hosting Together Again Festival next week! A new celebration of music and culture from July 24-26.

moments.title: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival
moments.blurb: Scotland's Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival is set to run from July 30th to August 1st in the Highlands, promising a family-friendly music and arts experience.

angles.name: Highlands Hype
angles.copy: The Tartan Heart is calling! Belladrum Festival is just around the corner, bringing three days of music and arts to the beautiful Scottish Highlands from July 30th.

angles.name: Family Festival
angles.copy: Planning a family festival trip? Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off July 30th for a weekend of music and arts in the Highlands.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin Across UK
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are now breaking up or have already started their summer holidays, with England and Wales generally beginning on July 20th.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many pupils across the UK are now officially on their summer holidays. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Local Break Up
angles.copy: Are your local schools breaking up for summer this week? Wishing all students a fantastic, well-deserved summer holiday!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: Parts of England and Wales are experiencing an ongoing heatwave with temperatures exceeding 30C, expected to remain hot, particularly in the South West, into next week.

angles.name: Stay Cool
angles.copy: Another hot one today! Stay hydrated and seek shade as the heatwave continues across parts of the UK. How are you keeping cool?

angles.name: Local Heat
angles.copy: Devon, it's set to stay scorching hot into next week! Remember to look after yourselves and check in on vulnerable neighbours.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Make Chart History
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is predicted to secure its 17th non-consecutive week at UK Number 1, making it the longest-running British single to top the chart, surpassing Wet Wet Wet's 'Love Is All Around'.

angles.name: Chart Record Breaker
angles.copy: History made! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are set for a 17th week at Number 1 with 'Rein Me In', smashing the record for the longest-running British chart-topper! Huge achievement!

angles.name: World Cup Chart Battle
angles.copy: Can Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold off the World Cup anthems? 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are surging up the charts as England plays Argentina today!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on July 20th! What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: Singer Kim Carnes, known for 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 on July 20th.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Kim Carnes this Saturday! 'Bette Davis Eyes' still sounds as cool as ever. #KimCarnes

moments.title: Happy Birthday Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, drummer of punk legends Sex Pistols, celebrates his 70th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, the drumming force behind the Sex Pistols, this Saturday! Anarchy in the UK, indeed! #SexPistols

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick MacNeil
moments.blurb: Mick MacNeil, keyboardist for Scottish rock band Simple Minds, turns 68 on July 20th.

angles.name: Simple Minds Star
angles.copy: Don't you forget about him! Happy 68th Birthday to Simple Minds' Mick MacNeil this Saturday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stone Gossard
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and co-founder Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Pearl Jam's legendary guitarist, Stone Gossard, this Saturday! Still rocking after all these years. #PearlJam

moments.title: Happy Birthday Andrew Stockdale
moments.blurb: Andrew Stockdale, the frontman of Australian rock band Wolfmother, turns 50 on July 20th.

angles.name: Wolfmother's Roar
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Wolfmother's powerful vocalist and guitarist, Andrew Stockdale, this Saturday! Get ready to feel the 'Joker & the Thief' vibes!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Damian Marley
moments.blurb: Reggae artist Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley, son of Bob Marley, celebrates his 48th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Reggae Royalty
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th Birthday to the incredible Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley on Sunday! What's your favourite track from the reggae icon?
